overview.name: HTTP POST
overview.description:
This scenario verifies HTTP POST method behavior.
Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with valid JSON body. 2. Verify response status = 201. 3. Validate created entity response body. 4. Reset in-memory storage after test.
This scenario validates: - Entity creation via POST method - JSON request body handling - Response body correctness - In-memory reset behavior

http.comment: Step 1-3. Create entity via POST request
Step 4. Reset entity storage after POST test
